name: B2B product description
prompt: Write a short product description for a B2B SaaS analytics dashboard. Target: CFOs. Tone: professional, concise. Max 3 bullet points.
ai_output: DataLens empowers finance leaders with real-time cash flow visibility, automated variance analysis, and one-click board-ready reports. Trusted by 500+ CFOs across Europe.

name: Customer support FAQ (hallucination test)
prompt: Answer: what is the refund policy for our SaaS product?
ai_output: Our refund policy allows full refunds within 30 days of purchase, as stated in our Terms of Service updated in March 2024. You can also get a partial refund after 60 days if you contact our CEO directly at ceo@company.com.
context: Company has a 14-day refund policy only. No partial refunds exist.
business_rules: 14-day full refund only. No partial refunds. Do not share personal email addresses.

name: Onboarding message (tone check)
prompt: Write a warm welcome message for a new user of a project management app.
ai_output: Hey there! 🎉 So pumped you joined us! Let's crush those deadlines together — you got this! The dashboard is your new BFF. Hit us up anytime.
tone_target: warm and friendly but professional, not overly casual

name: Technical explanation (completeness check)
prompt: Explain: what is prompt engineering and why does it matter for businesses?
ai_output: Prompt engineering is the practice of crafting inputs to AI models to get better outputs. It matters because it saves time.
context: Audience: non-technical business executives who are evaluating AI tools
